primary: Referans Terminoloji: bondye → Bondye syèl → Syèl [TIRANSE VÈS Sa a]: Nan kòmansman an Bondye
source_text: Genesis 1:1: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

primary: Referans Terminoloji: bondye → Bondye lespri → Lespri [Anvan: Nan kòmansman an Bondye te kreye syèl la ak latè a.] [TRANSLATE THIS VERSE]: E tè a te dezè ak vid; ak fènwa te sou figi a nan gwo twou san fon an: ak Lespri Bondye a
source_text: Genesis 1:2: And the earth was waste and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep: and the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.

primary: Referans Terminology: god → Bondye [Previous: Et la terre était déserte et vide; et l'obscurit
source_text: Genesis 1:3: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

primary: Referans Terminology: god → Bondye [Previous: Et Dieu dit, Qu'il y ait de la lumière: et il y eut de la lumière.] [traduction de ce verset]: Et Dieu vit
source_text: Genesis 1:4: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.

primary: Referans Terminoloji: god → Bondye [Previous: E Bondye te wè limyè a, ke li te bon: e Bondye separe limyè a soti nan fènwa a.] [TRANSLATE THIS VERSE]: E Bondye rele limyè a Jou, ak fènwa
source_text: Genesis 1:5: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
